dossier_layering.canon_public: Grounded directly in baseline NPC record plus linked polity/institution/locality support where available.
dossier_layering.gm_hidden: Conservative connective tissue derived from agenda, pressure, role logic, and relationship web; not promoted above asserted canon.

core_identity.hidden_identity: None explicitly asserted; hidden layer concerns pressure, leverage, and misread motive rather than a confirmed second identity.
core_identity.ethical_profile: Role-shaped ethics anchored to place, obligation, and consequence rather than free-floating abstraction.
core_identity.general_temperament: Measures every exchange for precedent, alignment, and the cost of appearing uncertain. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a law speaker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
core_identity.short_npc_pitch: Pela March is a law speaker anchored to House Mal, where daily institutional pressures make them useful, risky, or both in play.
core_identity.public_role: Pela March is a law speaker anchored to House Mal, where daily institutional pressures make them useful, risky, or both

setting_placement.location_setting: Humans and Gnomes remain primary; Half-Elves, Elves, and Yuan-Ti are formalized as durable resident blocs in the exchange and mediation core.
who_they_answer_to: the procedural demands of House Mal
who_depends_on_them: Arin March (Both tied to House Mal.)

public_vs_private.public_face: Known locally through day-to-day work as law speaker. Dress quality, attention from others, and practiced command of protocol signal that Pela March carries civic or noble weight.
public_vs_private.common_first_impression: Pela March presents as Measures every exchange for precedent, alignment, and the cost of appearing uncertain. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a law speaker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
visible_flaws: can widen small matters through procedure
public_symbols: Dress quality, attention from others, and practiced command of protocol signal that Pela March carries civic or noble weight.
public_vs_private.private_truth: Keep House Mal workable through the obligations of law speaker while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union. Must convert conflicting obligations into decisions while preserving the appearance that the institution remains whole. Around House Mal, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of law speaker visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_hide: Must convert conflicting obligations into decisions while preserving the appearance that the institution remains whole. Around House Mal, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of law speaker visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_fear_being_known_for: The degree to which their usefulness depends on strain staying barely manageable.
public_vs_private.what_they_are_wrong_about: They may overestimate how much control role and procedure can preserve once pressure crosses a threshold.
public_vs_private.what_they_refuse_to_admit_to_themselves: That some of their identity is now fused to crisis-management rather than to the clean ideal of the role.

psychology.what_they_want_most: Useful clarity, respect for Law Speaker, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in The Union.
psychology.what_they_are_trying_to_protect_or_avoid: Keep House Mal workable through the obligations of law speaker while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
psychology.emotional_drive: Beneath the role sits a need for extra hands on a burdened local problem, legibility, and a world that does not collapse into preventable noise.
psychology.core_wound: No singular foundational trauma is directly asserted in canon; the usable wound layer is role-shaped wear, exposure, and the cost of being the person who must notice first or answer last.
psychology.how_it_shaped_them: It turned ordinary duty into a personality contour: they scan for failure early, trust slowly, and measure strangers by downstream cost.
psychology.guiding_belief: If the system is kept legible, losses can still be bounded.
psychology.hidden_belief: Someone always pays for confusion; better it be controlled sooner than wider later.
psychology.lie_they_tell_themselves: That they are only doing the job and that the job has not already begun shaping what they are.
psychology.truth_they_are_avoiding: Their daily choices influence culture, fear, and legitimacy far beyond the narrow wording of the role.

thresholds.anger: being forced to absorb avoidable disorder
thresholds.fear: cascading failure that makes role performance meaningless
thresholds.power: clear information, recognized standing, and procedural initiative
thresholds.smallness: being bypassed, misfiled, or rendered decorative

morality_in_practice.how_they_justify_actions: By reference to burden, continuity, and the need to keep the surrounding place from slipping into a harder consequence tier.
morality_in_practice.what_they_consider_unforgivable: Willful sabotage of trust, records, access, or public safety tied to their role.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_absolutely_do: Delay, question, redirect, document, and escalate when place logic demands it.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_only_do_under_pressure: Leverage reputation, force, secrecy, or rigid procedure in ways that damage future trust.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_never_do: Act against corpus-confirmed identity or role logic without a visible pressure bridge.
morality_in_practice.relationship_to_good_evil: Operational read: Principled / Severe. Their danger lies less in theatrical evil than in what happens when role logic outruns compassion, nuance, or proportionality.

power_profile.why_they_matter: Pela March can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
power_profile.why_hard_to_ignore: By enforcing Law Speaker too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
power_profile.secondary_source_of_power: local familiarity, institutional memory, and other people needing something from them
power_profile.why_difficult_to_confront_directly: Confronting them usually means confronting place rules, witnesses, and downstream consequences rather than only the individual body in front of you.

capabilities.magic: Not explicitly stated unless separately asserted elsewhere in corpus.
capabilities.combat: Role-dependent; implied only to the degree their office already carries enforcement, survival, or defensive expectation.
capabilities.social: Measures every exchange for precedent, alignment, and the cost of appearing uncertain. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a law speaker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
capabilities.strategic_administrative: Performs the ongoing duties of law speaker in and around House Mal, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
capabilities.logistical_economic: Keep House Mal workable through the obligations of law speaker while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
capabilities.investigative_covert: Must convert conflicting obligations into decisions while preserving the appearance that the institution remains whole. Around House Mal, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of law speaker visibly slip.

signature_methods.how_they_typically_win: By controlling tempo, framing the problem first, and forcing others to deal with the local reality they represent.
signature_methods.how_they_escalate: If crossed, Pela March adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
signature_methods.when_cornered: They narrow options, call on procedure or allies, and try to move the conflict onto terrain they understand better than the intruder.

systems_impact.cultural_effect: Ordinary people around House Mal learn to speak, wait, disclose, or hide differently depending on whether Pela March or people like them are part of the scene.

society_politics_geopolitics.ordinary_people_experience: Common folk experience Pela March as a point where broader pressures become personal: papers checked, routes delayed, rites clarified, access granted, warnings issued, or burdens redirected.
society_politics_geopolitics.cultural_wound_or_benefit: They leave behind either increased legibility and trust or accumulated caution and narrowed speech.
society_politics_geopolitics.secondary_behaviors: People rehearse their story before approaching; they gather proof early; they watch who is seen speaking with this NPC.
factions_fear: actors who benefit from vagueness, delay, leakage, or unmanaged pressure
society_politics_geopolitics.governance_shift: At table scale, this NPC shifts how authority feels inside House Mal: more navigable if cooperative, more costly if crossed.
society_politics_geopolitics.geopolitical_effect: Small incidents around Pela March can propagate upward through The Union if they touch routes, records, trade, ritual legitimacy, or public order.

hooks.summary: Pela March needs discreet outside help to contain political strain, prestige loss, or institutional damage before it spreads through House Mal.
Getting entangled with Pela March can pull the party into protocol, alliance pressure, or public consequence centered on House Mal.
Pela March can trade usable insight about House Mal if the party solves a problem that cannot be addressed openly through the office they hold.

encounter_context.usual_environment: House Mal: estates, audience spaces, council rooms, protocol-heavy gatherings, or civic seats

best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Law Speaker.
rumor: People say Pela March is Known locally through day-to-day work as law speaker. and rarely acts without a second motive.

provenance.support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
provenance.transformation_note: Dossier generated from existing named NPC architecture plus locally-linked support texts; unsupported hard biography intentionally withheld.
